naturalLanguageQuery: show me controls and faqs about api security
generatedSQL:
SELECT 
    c."short", 
    c."long", 
    f."question", 
    f."answer"
FROM 
    "allTrustControls" c
JOIN 
    "allTrustFaqs" f ON c."category" = f."category"
WHERE 
    c."searchText" ILIKE '%API%' OR f."searchText" ILIKE '%API%';
expectedSQL: SELECT * FROM "allTrustControls" WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%api%' UNION ALL SELECT * FROM "allTrustFaqs" WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%api%';
